items: "Champ guide" renamed to "Matchup guide", with a champion icon next to the "My champion" selector
Ability cooldown tables (Q/W/E/R across levels 1/3/6/9/11/13/16/18) — always shown for "My champion", and for the opponent once a matchup is expanded
Fixed oversized champion icons in the Matchup guide's matchup row headers
Default champion setting — preselects "My champion" when you open the Matchup guide
New Research tab — a study journal for other players' games: Markdown notes and attached screenshots
Matchup guide: mobafire-style item build per champion — a core build order plus labeled situational sections, picked from real item icons
PDF export now mirrors the full Matchup guide (item build included), not just notes and runes
Matchup guide rune-page icons made smaller
"My champions" section on Overview now collapses by default
Matchup guide can be exported as a printable PDF — general notes, patch, rune pages (with icons), and notes for every matchup
Accent color customization in Settings — pick any color for buttons, active tabs, links, and chart lines
Appearance settings — adjustable opacity (see-through panels, like a translucent terminal) and an optional background picture
Runes actually played now show in a block game's expanded stats panel too, mirroring Overview and Matchup guide
Removed the 10-game cap on block size — set any block size in Settings
Recent games (Overview and Matchup guide) now show the game's time, not just the date
Fixed the packaged Windows app crashing on launch (AttributeError from uvicorn's logging setup touching a None stderr in the windowed/no-console build)
Overview tab's Recent games now records and shows the opponent's runes too, not just yours — click the ▸ Runes toggle on a game to compare both side by side
Crawler now also captures the lane opponent's runes (not just tracked accounts); run ./crawl.sh --backfill-runes again to fill in opponent runes for matches crawled before this update
Overview tab's Recent games table now shows the runes actually played per game
Attach short clips (upload a local video, or paste a YouTube/Twitch link) to a specific part of a coaching session or a specific game in a block — each clip gets its own label
Matchup guide matchups are collapsed by default — click a matchup to expand its notes, runes, and recent games, instead of everything loading open at once
Recent games now only fetch when you expand a matchup, not for every matchup up front
Recent games in the Matchup guide now show the full rune page actually played (keystone, minors, secondary tree, shards), not just the keystone
Matchup guide's matchup rows show a "Recent games" column on the right — real games vs that opponent, with the runes you actually played in each one
Crawler now records the actual rune page played per game for tracked accounts; run `./crawl.sh --backfill-runes` to fill it in for matches crawled before this update
General notes section on the Matchup guide page, for champion-wide tips that aren't tied to one matchup
Export/import a champion's whole guide as a JSON file, with an optional password (real encryption, not just obfuscation) — Export/Import menus on the Matchup guide page

Matchup guide moved to its own page — pick any champion (full roster, not just ones you've played) and see/edit full rune pages, patch, and notes for every matchup it has faced, or add one for a matchup you haven't played yet
Rune picker is now a full click-through builder — primary tree, keystone, 3 minor rows, secondary tree, 2 secondary minors, and 3 stat shards, with real rune icons
A matchup can hold more than one rune page (e.g. alternatives you're testing)
Matchup guide is scoped per (your champion, opponent) instead of just the opponent — Gwen vs Darius and Camille vs Darius get separate guides
Matchups table links out to the Matchup guide page for the selected "My champion" filter
Matchup guide tab on matchups — record a rune keystone + secondary tree, patch version, and Markdown notes on how to play each matchup
Blocks auto-close when a newly added game is too far (game time) from the block's latest game — threshold in Settings (default 3 h, 0 = off), with an optional confirmation prompt (on by default)
Settings page grouped into sections with a sticky, more visible Save bar
Block notes in matchups render as Markdown (all notes now do, everywhere)
Patch notes panel — this one! 📋 in the top bar
Adjustable block size in Settings (1–10 games, default 3)
Matchups table marks champions that have block notes (🧱) alongside manual notes (📝)
Block notes in the matchup overview can expand the block's learnings inline
Account selector: multi-select dropdown in the top bar, works in every view, tier-colored, 'All accounts' default
Blocks can be closed early (with confirmation; irreversible)
Coaching sessions always shown in full; stats scope to the selected accounts
Block notes vs each champion shown inside the matchup overview, with links to their blocks
MIT license
'Hide my rank / LP' setting hides your own rank everywhere, including graphs
Matchup overview split into two columns: notes left, win/loss timeline right
Win/loss bars click through to that game's details
Rolling 10-game graph of lane won @7/@14 min per matchup
Matchups moved to their own tab with per-matchup notes (Markdown) and win/loss timeline
Rank chart estimates LP between snapshots from ranked wins/losses (fainter line)
Rank over time chart on the Overview with a vertical line for every coaching session
